title: THE BOUSFIELD–KAN SPECTRAL SEQUENCE FOR MORAVA $K$-THEORY
journal: Proceedings of the Edinburgh Mathematical Society
abstract: AbstractWe construct a spectral sequence converging to the $E_{2}$-term of the Bousfield–Kan spectral sequence (BKSS) for a wide variety of homology theories. Using this, the $E_{2}$-term of the BKSS based on $K(1)$-theory for the odd spheres is computed and the unstable $K(1)$-completion is computed.
